strengths: Extensive fullstack experience across TypeScript, React, Node.js, and REST APIs
Proven ability to own end-to-end systems from database to UI across multiple domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication through workshops and talks
concerns: No explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or relational database work despite required skills
Primary stack includes DLang, MongoDB, and non-standard tools — not aligned with platform’s tech priorities
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required

key_factors.factor: Relevance of Experience to Renewable Energy/Construction Tech

response.justification: Despite broad fullstack experience, the candidate lacks direct exposure to PostgreSQL, Nest.js, and relational data modeling — core requirements for the role — while relying heavily on non-standard tools like DLang and MongoDB; their basic German proficiency undermines the high on-site presence requirement, and their background in direct mail, GIS, and AI-agent infrastructure shows minimal alignment with renewable energy or building-renovation workflows.
